title: OpenVigil France
description: Open pharmacovigilance analytics — disproportionality analysis on FAERS and French PV data

tools.name: compute-disproportionality
tools.description: Compute PRR, ROR, and IC for a drug-event combination using FAERS data
tools.stub_response: {"status": "stub", "message": "Will query OpenVigil API for 2x2 contingency table and compute PRR/ROR/IC with confidence intervals."}

tools.name: get-top-reactions
tools.description: Get top adverse reactions for a drug ranked by disproportionality score
tools.stub_response: {"status": "stub", "message": "Will return ranked reaction list with PRR, ROR, case count for each."}

tools.name: get-top-drugs
tools.description: Get top drugs associated with a specific adverse event

tools.name: get-case-demographics
tools.description: Get demographic breakdown of cases for a drug-event pair
